sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Big Short Steve Eisman Favors Schwab, Cites Robinhood's Lack Of 'Margin For Error' Amid Bitcoin-Led Crypto Slide
feed.summary: Steve Eisman, the famed "Big Short" investor, favors Charles Schwab over Robinhood due to Robinhood's significant exposure to the volatile cryptocurrency market and its high valuation. He warns that Robinhood has "no margin for error" given its struggles with declining crypto prices, which have impacted its earnings, revenue, and net new assets. Eisman also notes that Coinbase faces similar challenges, with its stock performance directly tied to the falling crypto market.

feed.title: Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund Has $3.15 Million Stock Position in Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP
feed.summary: The Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund (IMRF) recently decreased its stake in Targa Resources (TRGP) by 19.3% in Q3, selling 4,515 shares and ending with a $3.15 million position. Despite IMRF's reduction, institutional ownership in Targa Resources remains high at 92.13%, with major investors like Vanguard and Norges Bank holding substantial positions. Targa Resources, a midstream energy company, has a market cap of $48.03 billion and a P/E ratio of 29.75, and recently paid a quarterly dividend of $1.00.

feed.title: LSV Asset Management Purchases New Position in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: LSV Asset Management has opened a new position in PepsiCo, acquiring 25,684 shares valued at approximately $3.61 million in the third quarter. Institutional investors now own about 73.07% of PepsiCo's stock as other firms also increased their holdings. The company recently reported a slight earnings beat, declared a quarterly dividend, and approved a $10 billion share buyback, but also issued €2.5 billion in senior notes, increasing its gross debt.

feed.title: Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund Has $3.12 Million Position in APA Corporation $APA
feed.summary: The Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund significantly increased its stake in APA Corporation, holding 128,555 shares valued at $3.12 million after an 88% increase in Q3. APA recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share, yielding 3.6%, and trades near its average price target of $26.35 with a "Hold" consensus rating from Wall Street analysts. The company operates in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas, with major holdings in the Permian Basin.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) Is Increasing Its Dividend To $0.44
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) is raising its quarterly dividend to $0.44 per share, resulting in a 3.8% dividend yield. While the dividend is covered by the company's cash flow despite profits not fully covering it, the company has a history of dividend volatility with at least one cut in the last decade. Analysts project a significant increase in EPS next year, which could lead to a more sustainable payout ratio if the growth is consistent.

feed.title: CF Bankshares Inc. (NASDAQ:CFBK) Short Interest Down 16.2% in January
feed.summary: CF Bankshares Inc. (NASDAQ:CFBK) experienced a 16.2% decrease in short interest during January, with 81,808 shares reported as of January 30th. This represents 1.6% of the company's shares sold short, with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.9 days based on average daily volume. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend increase and reported earnings of $0.88 per share, beating analyst estimates despite revenue being below expectations.

feed.title: MGM Resorts earns 13 Forbes Travel Guide five-star awards in Las Vegas and Macau
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has received 13 Five-Star ratings from Forbes Travel Guide for its hotel accommodations, spa operations, and fine-dining outlets in Las Vegas and Macau. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to world-class hospitality, with several establishments earning multi-year distinctions, including Joël Robuchon at MGM Grand receiving its 20th consecutive Five-Star rating. The awards cover various properties like ARIA Sky Suites and MGM MACAU, validating the high standards of guest experience, service, and facilities across the MGM Resorts portfolio.

feed.title: Medtronic secures FDA approval for Stealth AXiS spine robotics platform
feed.summary: Medtronic has received FDA clearance for its Stealth AXiS spine surgery robotics platform, an integrated solution combining robotics, planning, and navigation for spine procedures. The system is a core component of Medtronic's AiBLE smart ecosystem, designed to streamline surgical processes and offer future expansion into cranial and ENT applications. This technology aims to provide more predictable and personalized care by reducing the need for repeated imaging and supporting consistent execution of patient-specific surgical plans.

feed.title: BBVA Announces New Share Buyback Program
feed.summary: BBVA (Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria) has announced a new share buyback program to repurchase its own shares, signaling capital strength and supporting its capital management strategy. This move is expected to boost earnings per share, optimize its balance sheet, and enhance investor confidence in the bank's financial health. BBVA is a global financial institution focusing on retail and commercial banking, corporate and investment banking, and asset management in Europe and Latin America.

feed.title: Prospera Financial Services Inc Sells 6,215 Shares of lululemon athletica inc. $LULU

feed.title: ProShare Advisors LLC Lowers Stock Position in Enphase Energy, Inc. $ENPH

Enphase Energy reported mixed quarterly results, beating EPS estimates but experiencing a 10.3% year-over-year revenue decline, and currently carries a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Will Cooper Companies' (COO) Term Loan Extension and Added Flexibility Reshape Its Capital Structure Narrative?
feed.summary: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) recently amended its 2021 Term Loan Agreement, extending $950 million in loans and increasing flexibility, which could influence its capital structure. This move modestly strengthens the balance sheet but doesn't alter the near-term focus on MyDAY execution and upcoming Q1 FY2026 earnings. Investors will be watching how these changes support growth amid a cooling contact lens market.

feed.title: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) Stock Rockets 26% But Many Are Still Ignoring The Company
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) shares have surged 26% within the last month and 20% over the past year, yet its P/E ratio of 12x remains low compared to the broader US market. This low P/E is attributed to the company's recent declining earnings. Despite analyst forecasts predicting a 12% annual earnings growth for the next three years, matching market averages, investors appear unconvinced, suggesting potential underlying risks or doubts about achieving these expectations.

feed.title: North America Dominates Medical Waste Management Market with 33% Revenue Share, Driving Expansion to USD 59.45 billion by 2030 | Key Players - Stericycle Inc., Sharp Compliance Inc., Waste Management Inc.
feed.summary: The global Medical Waste Management Market was valued at USD 34.08 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow to USD 59.45 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 8.0%. North America currently leads with a 33% revenue share, largely due to stringent regulations and advanced healthcare infrastructure. The market's growth is fueled by expanding healthcare services, technological advancements in waste treatment, and increasing emphasis on eco-friendly practices, though high operational costs and inconsistent regulations pose challenges.

feed.title: Sen. John Boozman Sells Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) Stock
feed.summary: Senator John Boozman (R-Arkansas) has recently disclosed multiple stock trades, including selling Omnicom Group (OMC) shares on January 15th and January 29th, with transaction values ranging from $1,001 to $15,000. He also made various purchases and sales of other stocks like Eaton, Caterpillar, CVS, and iShares S&P 500 Growth ETF around the same period. Meanwhile, Omnicom Group shows a strong institutional backing, with major firms like Vanguard and State Street increasing their holdings, and the company recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.80 per share.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM is Kinsale Capital Group Inc.'s 4th Largest Position

feed.title: Sen. John Boozman Buys Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) Shares
feed.summary: Senator John Boozman recently purchased shares of Exxon Mobil (NYSE: XOM), with the transaction disclosed on February 15th for shares bought on January 8th. The oil giant exceeded Q4 earnings estimates with $1.71 EPS against $1.63 and revenue of $82.31 billion against $77.98 billion, also declaring a quarterly dividend of $1.03 per share. Despite recent buying activity from institutional investors and Sen. Boozman, Exxon Mobil currently has a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: After Earnings, Is Alphabet Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Alphabet reported strong fiscal fourth-quarter earnings with sales up 18%, driven significantly by Google Cloud's 48% growth, affirming its position as an AI leader. Morningstar maintains a $340 fair value estimate, viewing the stock as fairly valued despite significant planned capital expenditures for AI in 2026. The company benefits from a wide economic moat and strong financial health but faces uncertainty from antitrust regulation and the high costs associated with AI investments.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock 2030 Strategy: $7B EBITDA & $14B Cash Flow Plan - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc has announced its medium-term strategy for 2026-2030, aiming for a $7 billion adjusted EBITDA by 2030, representing a 7% compound annual growth rate. The company also projects $14 billion in cumulative discretionary free cash flow during this period, alongside a commitment to keep its net debt-to-EBITDA ratio below 2.0 times, based on expected moderate market growth and conservative pricing. The strategy emphasizes operational efficiency and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans Decreases Stock Position in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans significantly reduced its holdings in FactSet Research Systems Inc. by 86% in the third quarter, selling 17,718 shares and retaining 2,883 shares valued at approximately $825,000. This decrease comes despite FactSet exceeding quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, announcing a $600 million share buyback, and declaring a $1.10 quarterly dividend. However, insider sales and a mixed-to-negative outlook from brokers, with an average "Reduce" rating, suggest caution regarding the stock.

feed.title: Goldman’s Snider Says Analysts Turn Positive on Software Profits
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. strategists, led by Ben Snider, report that analysts are increasing earnings estimates for software stocks, despite concerns about AI disruption. Over the past three months, two-year forward earnings estimates for software stocks have grown by 5%. Industries thought to be most vulnerable to AI have notably received positive revisions for their 2026 earnings-per-share projections and showed double-digit growth in fourth-quarter earnings.

feed.title: Hubbell Inc (NYSE:HUBB) Stands Out as a Quality 'Caviar Cruise' Investment
feed.summary: Hubbell Inc (NYSE:HUBB) is identified as a quality investment based on the "Caviar Cruise" stock screen, which seeks companies with lasting competitive strengths and reliable expansion. The company demonstrates strong revenue and EBIT growth, outstanding return on invested capital, and sound financial health with reasonable debt and high-grade earnings. While its P/E ratio appears high, it is competitive within its industry, and the report recommends further investigation beyond quantitative data.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries posts solid Q4 despite annual sales dip
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries reported a 2.4% increase in fourth-quarter 2025 revenue to $2.7 billion, despite a slight 0.5% dip in net sales for the full year, reaching $10.8 billion. The company achieved $90 million in Q4 net earnings and $370 million for the full year, driven by productivity gains and restructuring efforts. CEO Jeff Lorberbaum noted stable commercial demand but highlighted challenges from weak U.S. housing turnover, with the company focusing on profitable growth and market position ahead of a housing recovery.

feed.title: 3 Reasons to Avoid CLBK and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
feed.summary: Columbia Financial (CLBK) has seen its stock price rise significantly, outperforming the S&P 500. However, StockStory recommends avoiding it due to flat net interest income, a low net interest margin indicating weak loan book profitability, and declining earnings per share. Instead, the article suggests looking for high-quality growth stocks with more timely opportunities.

feed.title: |5 Insightful Analyst Questions From Ameris Bancorp’s Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: |Ameris Bancorp reported Q4 results that met revenue expectations, driven by higher net interest income and efficient expense management. The company achieved record earnings for 2025, with diluted EPS reaching $6 per share for the first time. Analysts focused on future CRE payoffs, net interest margin expectations, capital deployment, mortgage segment performance, and strategies for deposit growth.

feed.title: American Public Education, Inc. $APEI Position Cut by Bastion Asset Management Inc.

feed.title: CRH Expands $300 Million Buyback With Fresh NYSE Share Repurchase
feed.summary: CRH plc has continued its share buyback program in the U.S., repurchasing 29,600 NYSE-listed shares at an average price of $124.93, which will be canceled. This action is part of a larger plan to repurchase up to $300 million in shares by February 2026, aiming to reduce the number of shares in issue and potentially boost earnings per share. The building materials company’s ongoing capital return strategy reflects management's confidence in its financial health and future prospects.

feed.title: Inside Coca‑Cola’s 2026 growth playbook: Digital, innovation and change
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is implementing a bold growth strategy for 2026 focused on digital transformation, innovation, and leadership changes. This includes appointing a new CEO, Henrique Braun, and a chief digital officer, Sedef Salingan Sahin, to drive digital prowess and efficiency. The company is also prioritizing "bigger and bolder innovation" in its product portfolio and localizing marketing strategies to recruit new consumers, while facing challenges like the future of Costa Coffee.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp Acquires 6,655 Shares of GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp has increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. by 7.3%, acquiring an additional 6,655 shares to bring its total holdings to 98,403 shares, valued at approximately $60.51 million. This comes as GE Vernova reported strong Q4 results, exceeding analyst expectations with EPS of $13.39 and revenue of $10.96 billion. The company also doubled its quarterly dividend to $0.50, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price near $788.

feed.title: Costco launches mobile app ordering for custom cakes and deli trays, easing customer woes
feed.summary: Costco is overhauling its custom cake and deli tray ordering system by introducing mobile app and website options, retiring a decades-old paper form process that customers found inconvenient. This digital move, which executives described as streamlining a "clunky" system, will allow shoppers to customize orders online. The feature is expected to be fully implemented across all locations by the end of 2026, making it easier for members, especially those living far from stores, to place orders.

feed.title: Costamare Inc. Sets the Date for its Fourth Quarter 2025 Results Release, Conference Call and Webcast
